h2: Open Letter to Andy Burnham
text_excerpt: Campaigns - Elsie Blundell MP Skip to main content Elsie Blundell MP Parliamentary Website for Heywood and Middleton North About Contact Campaigns End Furniture Poverty Royal Mail Bring Back the Express! World Book Day Fly High More Menu Campaigns On my election I promised to stand up for the wonderful people and places of Heywood and Middleton. I want to see opportunities, jobs and a better quality of life brought to our area. We will do this with better infrastructure like Transport and internet connection. We deserve better schools, and Early Years support for parents and children alike. And we should have strong, sustainable communities which protect and serve citizens. I will champion our area and put my energy and passion into improving our communities. I hope you will join me. Email me if you have any ideas or want to participate: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk Campaigning for Heywood and Middleton North See more Open Letter to Andy Burnham Bring Back the 167 - an express direct-to-Manchester city centre bus service. bus Campaigns Bring Back the 167!
